summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Polyglot AI Security Hardening (Iteration 5). All 20 backend tests pass. All frontend features working correctly. Fixed one bug: revoked keys were still working (validate_api_key didn't check 'active' field).
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: validate_api_key now checks 'active: True' to properly reject revoked keys
All security features implemented correctly: SHA-256 hashing, one-time key display, rate limiting, daily caps, scoped permissions, key revocation
Code examples in UI properly use environment variables with security warnings
Security documentation page is comprehensive and well-organized
test_credentials: No authentication required. API keys are generated dynamically via POST /api/keys/generate
seed_data_creation: Test API keys created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 adds security hardening: SHA-256 hashed API keys at rest, one-time key display, per-key rate limiting (configurable req/min), daily usage caps, scoped permissions (read-only, translate, full), key revocation, Security documentation page. Bug fixed: validate_api_key now filters by 'active: True' to reject revoked keys.

api_key_generation.details: POST /api/keys/generate creates key with pk_ prefix, accepts scope/rate_limit/daily_cap parameters, returns full key once

key_masking.details: GET /api/keys returns masked keys (pk_xxxx************xxxx), never full key

key_authentication.details: Valid key works for /api/v1/translate, missing key returns 401, invalid key returns 401

scope_enforcement.details: translate scope can translate, read-only scope returns 403, full scope can translate

rate_limiting.details: Key with rate_limit=2 returns 429 after 2 requests in 1 minute

daily_cap.details: Key with daily_cap=3 returns 429 after 3 requests

key_revocation.details: DELETE /api/keys/{id} revokes key, revoked key returns 401, revoked key not in active list

security_tab.details: Security tab visible in Integrations page with comprehensive documentation

landing_page.details: Landing page loads correctly with hero, stats, capabilities

text_translation.details: Text translation works: 'Hello, how are you?' → 'Hola, ¿cómo estás?'

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/keys/generate: PASS - Creates key with pk_ prefix, scope, rate_limit, daily_cap
api_endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/keys/{id}: PASS - Revokes key, returns 404 for non-existent
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/v1/translate: PASS - Works with valid key, 401 without/invalid key, 403 for insufficient scope, 429 for rate limit/daily cap
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/docs/endpoints: PASS - Returns API docs with security info

bug_fixed.issue: Revoked API keys were still working for translation
bug_fixed.root_cause: validate_api_key function queried by key_hash but didn't filter by 'active: True'
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'active: True' to the MongoDB query in validate_api_key

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All features use real OpenAI integration via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
